# Dr. Honey
> Natural unfiltered honey from Kyrgyzstan, sold in Amman, Jordan.

- Site: https://drhoney.xyz/
- Russian: https://drhoney.xyz/ru
- Arabic: https://drhoney.xyz/ar
- Guide EN: https://drhoney.xyz/guides/buy-honey-amman
- Guide RU: https://drhoney.xyz/guides/kupit-naturalnyj-med-amman
- Guide AR: https://drhoney.xyz/guides/asal-tabii-amman
- Product: 900 g jar — 30 JOD
- Origin: Kyrgyzstan (Sowaj Jabal)
- Location: Tabarboor, Amman, Jordan
- Contact: WhatsApp +962 7 7722 6349
- Languages: English, Arabic, Russian (+ tourist-language SEO signals)

## Russian priority query
Купить натуральный мёд в Аммане — landing /ru and guide /guides/kupit-naturalnyj-med-amman

## Key facts
Dr. Honey is a local honey business in Amman selling one product: raw natural unfiltered honey in a 900 g jar for 30 Jordanian dinars.
